title: ALP Library Alias Table v1
description: Validates metadata/library-aliases-v1.json -- the legacy-token -> canonical-manifest-name map used by WS6-c (#610 §6) to consolidate the per-core `libraries:` enum onto the manifest model. check_library_registry.py additionally asserts every value names an existing metadata/libraries/<name>.yaml. A transitional artifact retired once no board.yaml uses the legacy tokens.
